zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱
zh.content:
当前BTC价格围绕76500附近震荡，整体仍受20日均线下方压制，短线结构偏弱，反弹动能不足，市场情绪谨慎。等待方向选择短期以弱势震荡为主

MACD柱值为负且持续走低，空头动能占优，未见明显背离信号；若无法收复零轴，反弹高度将受限制。短线偏空延续需谨慎追涨参与

下方支撑关注76500及76000整数关口，上方阻力位于77000与均线77100附近，突破前需量能确认。区间震荡明显化

操作上建议以观望或高抛低吸为主，未有效突破均线前不宜激进做多，可等待确认后再跟随趋势。严格控制风险设置止损保护资金仓位管理

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin remains under moderate bearish pressure after failing to reclaim the 20-day moving average near 77,095. Price action around 76,543 suggests weakening momentum, especially as the market trades closer to the daily low than the session high. The narrow trading range between 76,512 and 76,840 reflects hesitation among buyers, while the negative 24-hour change indicates sellers still maintain short-term control. Unless bulls regain momentum quickly, the pair may continue consolidating beneath key resistance zones.

The MACD reading at -119.45 reinforces the current downside bias, signaling fading bullish momentum and the possibility of extended corrective movement. Although the RSI value is unavailable, recent price structure implies neutral-to-weak momentum rather than oversold conditions. Trading below the SMA(20) further confirms that Bitcoin is struggling to sustain upward continuation after previous rallies. Momentum traders will likely remain cautious until price action stabilizes above the moving average and confirms renewed buying strength.

Immediate support appears near 76,500, which aligns closely with the recent intraday low. A decisive break beneath this area could expose deeper downside toward 75,800 and potentially 75,000 if selling accelerates. On the upside, resistance remains concentrated near 76,850 followed by the stronger technical barrier around 77,100 represented by the SMA(20). A successful breakout above this zone would improve sentiment and potentially trigger renewed upside momentum toward the 78,000 region.

Short-term traders may prefer a defensive approach while Bitcoin remains below resistance. Conservative participants could wait for confirmation above 77,100 before considering momentum-based long positions. Meanwhile, aggressive traders may look for short opportunities on failed rallies near resistance, particularly if volume weakens further. Risk management remains essential due to Bitcoin’s elevated volatility. Tight stop placement near breakout levels and disciplined position sizing are advisable until a clearer directional trend develops.
